title: Banner component for resumed agent chat sessions
purpose: Displays a banner indicating when an agent session has been resumed, showing session ID and prior turn count with optional dismiss functionality.
module_context: Exports a React functional component ResumedBanner that accepts session ID, turn count, and dismiss handler props, and renders a styled banner with truncation and optional dismiss button.

steps.content: Extract session ID, turn count, and dismiss handler from the props.
Truncate the session ID to first 8 characters for display.
Use the provided turn count or default to zero if not specified.
Render a status banner with the truncated ID and turn count.
IF a dismiss handler is provided, render a dismiss button with appropriate styling.
